---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear, concise description of the feature.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Approach

How should this be implemented? Include:
- Algorithm or design overview
- Which files need to change
- Any new dependencies

## Benchmark Plan

If this involves a scorer or compaction change:
- What benchmark will validate it?
- What is the target score?
- How will regression be prevented?

## Additional Context

Any references, papers, or related issues.
